subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy handmaiden whom Thou hast made to be a bond-servant in Thy dominion and hast attributed unto this Thy servant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم ان هذه امتک التی جعلتها مملوکه فی ملکک و نسبتها لعبدک هذا
subcodes.subjects: @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God
